info.title: Graylog REST API
info.description: Graylog is a centralized log management platform. The Graylog REST API provides programmatic access to all Graylog functionality including search, inputs, streams, dashboards, alerts, users, and system configuration.

get.description: Execute a search query with a relative time range

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

get.description: Execute a search query with an absolute time range
Execute a search query with a keyword time range (e.g. last 5 minutes)
Returns system overview information including cluster ID, hostname, lifecycle, OS, version, and timezone
Returns list of all nodes in the Graylog cluster
Returns information about a specific cluster node
Get details of a specific input
Get details of a specific stream
List all rules for a stream
List API tokens for a user

post.description: Create an API token for a user

put.description: Add a user to this role

delete.description: Remove a user from this role

get.description: Get a specific metric by name

sessionToken.name: X-Requested-By
sessionToken.description: Session-based auth via Graylog web interface cookie plus X-Requested-By header

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic authentication with username and password

bearerToken.description: Token-based authentication using API tokens created via /users/{username}/tokens
